title: Symlink in Workdir cause error
body:
**Description**

When the WORKDIR is a symlink, the directory is not resolved appropriately.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1.  See received results.


**Describe the results you received:**
As reported by @karelyatin in #1443.

@EmilienM @TomSweeneyRedHat i tried with the recent PR and i see similar Error as we have with buidah-1.7.1:-
```
[zuul@standalone ~]$ buildah --version
buildah version 1.7.1 (image-spec 1.0.0, runtime-spec 1.0.0)

[zuul@standalone ~]$ sudo buildah bud --tls-verify=False  -t 127.0.0.1:8787/tripleomaster/centos-binary-tempest:be90d93c3c5f77f428d12a9a8a2ef97b9dada8f3_5b53d5ba tempest
STEP 1: FROM docker.io/tripleomaster/centos-binary-openstack-base:be90d93c3c5f77f428d12a9a8a2ef97b9dada8f3_5b53d5ba
STEP 2: LABEL maintainer="Kolla Project (https://launchpad.net/kolla)" name="tempest" build-date="20190415"
STEP 3: RUN usermod --append --home /var/lib/tempest --groups kolla tempest     && mkdir -p /var/lib/tempest     && chown -R 42480:42480 /var/lib/tempest
STEP 4: RUN ln -sf /var/lib/tempest /tempest
STEP 5: WORKDIR /tempest
error building at step {Env:[PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin KOLLA_BASE_DISTRO=centos KOLLA_INSTALL_TYPE=binary KOLLA_INSTALL_METATYPE=rdo KOLLA_DISTRO_PYTHON_VERSION=2.7 PS1=$(tput bold)($(printenv KOLLA_SERVICE_NAME))$(tput sgr0)[$(id -un)@$(hostname -s) $(pwd)]$ ] Command:workdir Args:[/tempest] Flags:[] Attrs:map[] Message:WORKDIR /tempest Original:WORKDIR /tempest}: error ensuring container path "/tempest": mkdir /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/609939041c25b5d318dcba013e5f8d26bfe11a040f579c16fb64958a5d9bb713/merged/tempest: file exists

[zuul@standalone ~]$ /usr/local/bin/buildah --version
buildah version 1.8-dev (image-spec 1.0.0, runtime-spec 1.0.0)

[zuul@standalone ~]$ sudo /usr/local/bin/buildah bud --tls-verify=False  -t 127.0.0.1:8787/tripleomaster/centos-binary-tempest:be90d93c3c5f77f428d12a9a8a2ef97b9dada8f3_5b53d5ba tempest
STEP 1: FROM docker.io/tripleomaster/centos-binary-openstack-base:be90d93c3c5f77f428d12a9a8a2ef97b9dada8f3_5b53d5ba
STEP 2: LABEL maintainer="Kolla Project (https://launchpad.net/kolla)" name="tempest" build-date="20190415"
STEP 3: RUN usermod --append --home /var/lib/tempest --groups kolla tempest     && mkdir -p /var/lib/tempest     && chown -R 42480:42480 /var/lib/tempest
STEP 4: RUN ln -sf /var/lib/tempest /tempest
STEP 5: WORKDIR /tempest
error building at STEP "WORKDIR /tempest": error ensuring container path "/tempest": mkdir /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/87bbfbded4d6dd20ee1961a664c530b49051dec4429ad1dee055071862f94788/merged/tempest: file exists


[zuul@standalone ~]$ cat tempest/Dockerfile 
FROM docker.io/tripleomaster/centos-binary-openstack-base:be90d93c3c5f77f428d12a9a8a2ef97b9dada8f3_5b53d5ba
LABEL maintainer="Kolla Project (https://launchpad.net/kolla)" name="tempest" build-date="20190415"
RUN usermod --append --home /var/lib/tempest --groups kolla tempest \
    && mkdir -p /var/lib/tempest \
    && chown -R 42480:42480 /var/lib/tempest
RUN ln -sf /var/lib/tempest /tempest
WORKDIR /tempest
RUN chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/kolla_extend_start
USER tempest
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Build to succeed


**Output of `buildah version`:**

buildah version 1.7.1 (image-spec 1.0.0, runtime-spec 1.0.0)

Fedora 29

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat i tried to patch buildah 1.7.1 like http://paste.openstack.org/show/749786/ and it's working for us like:- https://logs.rdoproject.org/84/20184/8/check/rdoinfo-tripleo-stein-centos-7-scenario001-standalone/0c695e4/logs/buildah-builds/kolla-hbUzcs/docker/tempest/tempest-build.log.txt.gz, can you check http://paste.openstack.org/show/749786/ and get it fixed. Mainly did: Check if path is symlink, find destination for symlink, and use it further to check for existence and creation.

@TomSweeneyRedHat,  revised a little and added to gist:- https://gist.githubusercontent.com/karelyatin/e09a2596cef8cbe532592e3329ac13c7/raw/b93945a32bbc82f0cc9203db67d93966448d4c58/BuildahWorkdirHandle
